Title: Valid Login
Pre-conditions:
1. User has a registered account
2. Valid User and Password
Test Steps:
1. Go to login page https://www.saucedemo.com/
2. Enter email
3. Enter password
4. Click 'Submit'

Title: Blocked User
Test Steps:
1. Go to login page https://www.saucedemo.com/
2. Enter email
3. Enter password
4. Click 'Submit'
Expected Result: An error message "Sorry, this user has been locked out."
Actual Result: Blocked user will receive an error message and unable to login with the same id.

Title: X user has UI Problem
Pre-conditions: User with username : problem_user is facing UI bug
Test Steps:
1. Go to login page https://www.saucedemo.com/
2. Enter email
3. Enter password
4. Click 'Submit'
Expected Result: Fully loaded product with the right title and the right images according to the product
Actual Result: all product are showing dog image.

Title: case sensitive credentials
Test Steps:
1. Go to login page https://www.saucedemo.com/
2. Enter email
3. Enter password
4. Click 'Submit'
Actual Result: Error message : "Username and password do not match any user in this service"
